productionObservation.observedThrough: Microsoft Edge read-only production pages and /api/health

evidenceBoundaries: The production observation is a current read-only point sample, not a replacement for release evidence validation or a 30-day SLO window.
The local branch is 8518a14dcf03cd70e5470c3c9fd81e6e23a5dcb2 with a dirty working tree; uncommitted local files are not proof of GitHub main or production capability.
Local production evidence files have mixed timestamps and statuses, so final production evidence alignment remains open.
The local Shadow baseline is older than the production point sample and remains a separate evidence source.

On 2026-07-11 the WP-G0.2 production add-schema attempt stopped at read-only PostgreSQL preflight: the only LOGIN role is the application superuser and no independent migration LOGIN identity exists. No backup, restore drill, schema migration, restart or runtime deployment occurred.

legacyItems.name: CoinGlass auth regression repair
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Current production health reports CoinGlass ready and scan produces candidates; old key propagation was the prior root cause.

legacyItems.name: SCAN-FIX production rerun
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Current scan is fresh and non-zero, but current release evidence and Git/content alignment are not closed.

legacyItems.name: Checkpoint outcome production rerun
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Runner code exists locally, but production UI exposes no Shadow worker and local recorded outcomes remain zero.

legacyItems.name: 24h Shadow health review
legacyItems.currentEvidence: No current canonical 24h run evidence with true recorded outcomes is available.

legacyItems.name: GitHub and Tencent production synchronization
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Local worktree is dirty and production pages do not expose an aligned release commit/content digest.

legacyItems.name: Full module and integration audit
legacyItems.currentEvidence: The 2026-07-10 comprehensive system audit mapped architecture, data flow, production behavior and capability gaps.
legacyItems.v3Destination: Archive; use findings in each gate

legacyItems.name: Skill library inventory
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Core code/spec inventory already exists; a standalone documentation inventory would duplicate the comprehensive audit.
legacyItems.v3Destination: Replace with executable capability registry in G0/G4

legacyItems.name: Skill gap review
legacyItems.currentEvidence: The comprehensive audit identified data, scanner, strategy, Shadow, review, frontend and engineering gaps.

legacyItems.name: Backend visualization contract
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Source/status/age contracts exist, but live pages still contain contradictory scan proofs, synthetic facts and false zero values.

legacyItems.name: Candidate observation lifecycle
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Tracking and outcome modules exist, but current review maps unknown direction to long, null metrics to zero and unresolved rows to timeout.

legacyItems.name: Known issue regression guard
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Many incident tests exist, but there is no single machine-readable registry tied to release gates.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G0 incident registry and CI guard

legacyItems.name: Engineering efficiency automation
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Production, evidence, security, scan, Shadow and backtest scripts exist; E2E, load and architecture-diff gates are missing.

legacyItems.name: Codex build and external audit collaboration standard
legacyItems.currentEvidence: AGENTS rules, project context, changelog and fixed evidence reporting are established.

legacyItems.name: Operations backup and disaster recovery
legacyItems.currentEvidence: pg_dump, restore guard and production drill scripts exist; offsite scheduling, encryption, retention evidence and real restore RPO/RTO are missing.

legacyItems.name: Shadow v1 metric baseline
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Local baseline has 24 events, 72 checkpoints, 48 pending_with_error and zero recorded outcomes; production shows zero approved/evaluated Shadow samples.

legacyItems.name: Daily Movers review
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Production review shows seven archived snapshots and one miss review, but zero pre-move samples.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G3 counterfactual discovery set and G5 outcomes

legacyItems.name: Core logic fit review
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Professional audit completed and found scan 50.74, analysis 46.57 and strategy 22.48 with no ready plan.

legacyItems.name: Anti-overfitting governance
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Research-only and no-auto-weight guards exist, but frozen holdout and minimum live sample governance are not fully enforced.

legacyItems.name: Misleading-risk audit
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Production still labels itself as a practical radar, shows duplicate scan proof, false zero and synthetic freshness while R4 is not met.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G0 P0 truth and naming repair

legacyItems.name: CEX futures logic standards library
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Core strategy, evidence, key-level, market-reading and risk specs exist; effectiveness is not proven.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G4 executable contracts, not document expansion

legacyItems.name: Fusion architecture and anti-island governance
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Multiple event, journal, Shadow and frontend models exist, but no single market fact, instrument identity or outcome state model exists.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G2 canonical facts and G5 outcomes

legacyItems.name: Real trade review standard
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Manual trade journal modules exist, but SYSTEM/USER/HYBRID workflow and private evidence storage are incomplete.

legacyItems.name: External data compliance gateway
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Current system uses official/public sources, but there is no machine-readable source approval registry.

legacyItems.name: CoinGlass and Coinalyze deep scan
legacyItems.currentEvidence: CoinGlass budget/cooldown is implemented; Coinalyze is not integrated and has no demonstrated marginal value.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G2 optimize current sources; paid source only through Shadow A/B

legacyItems.name: Orderbook liquidity and slippage
legacyItems.currentEvidence: WebSocket light scan and proxies exist, but production review shows almost no orderbook-pressure samples and no validated execution-cost model.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G2 microstructure quality and G4 execution risk

legacyItems.name: Active trade and order-flow delta
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Taker and pressure proxies exist, but production has one active-flow proxy sample and no validated CVD claim.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G2 candidate-only microstructure with explicit proxy labels

legacyItems.name: CEX contract events and announcements
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Macro and external-intel collectors exist; event coverage and compliance evidence are not complete.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G2 supporting context after core facts

legacyItems.name: Pre-move pattern library
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Pattern and pre-move modules exist, but production review shows zero pre-move samples.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G3 research-only hypotheses and holdout tests

legacyItems.name: Relative-strength selection engine
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Relative-strength leaderboard and multi-exchange public data exist, but aliases remain duplicated and most leaders never enter scan.

legacyItems.name: Shadow Tracking v2
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Shadow v1 is not yet a valid canonical outcome baseline.
legacyItems.v3Destination: Do not start until G5 v1 gate passes

legacyItems.name: Frontend trading intelligence dashboard
legacyItems.currentEvidence: All major pages exist, but factual consistency and operator workflow are not professional-grade.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G0 truth repair then G6 product convergence

legacyItems.name: Frontend visual design system
legacyItems.currentEvidence: A coherent dark terminal style exists; E2E, accessibility, visual regression and dynamic-content layout proof are absent.

legacyItems.name: Radar command dashboard
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Dashboard exists, but duplicates scan proof and shows conflicting zero/non-zero states.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G0 truth repair and G6 workflow

legacyItems.name: Strength observation board
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Leaderboard covers 1316 tickers, but identity duplicates and scan-entry gaps remain.

legacyItems.name: Single-token evidence dossier
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Token pages exist, but prior audit found stale/live and missing-field guard problems.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G0 truth contract and G6 operator workflow

legacyItems.name: Shadow performance center
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Review shows outcome-related cards, but valid MFE/MAE samples and canonical Shadow outcomes are zero.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G5 data first, G6 page second

legacyItems.name: Daily Movers review center
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Seven snapshots are visible, but coverage, counterfactual controls and pre-move attribution are thin.

legacyItems.name: System health center
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Six workers, Redis, Postgres and CoinGlass are visible; Shadow, Caddy, HTTPS, release, evidence, backup age, disk and rollback are absent.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G1 operations contract and G6 page

legacyItems.name: Whole-site visual and misleading audit
legacyItems.currentEvidence: No Playwright/Cypress suite or visual/accessibility regression exists and live contradictions remain.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G0 factual audit and G6 visual gate

legacyItems.name: Small-capital manual validation
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Real-money trades are not a valid software acceptance shortcut and the system is below R4.
legacyItems.v3Destination: Optional user-controlled pilot only after G7 R4 approval

legacyItems.name: Real trade review MVP
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Manual journal code exists; three-mode workflow, secure screenshot storage and reliable R/MFE/MAE are incomplete.

legacyItems.name: User-discovered opportunity miss analysis
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Missed-opportunity review modules exist, but user/system correlation workflow is incomplete.

legacyItems.name: Screenshot and chart annotation
legacyItems.currentEvidence: No secure upload/storage flow exists.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G6 optional after ASVS upload controls

legacyItems.name: Execution discipline statistics
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Manual journal tags exist, but production review does not expose validated user-only statistics.

legacyItems.name: Trade CSV import
legacyItems.currentEvidence: No secure CSV parser/import flow exists and it is not needed for core radar readiness.

legacyItems.name: Long-term automated iteration
legacyItems.currentEvidence: Scan, deep scan, outcomes, Daily Movers and reports have automation, but rule promotion and continuous assurance are incomplete.
legacyItems.v3Destination: G8; reports/proposals only, never automatic production mutation
